mapper.select: SELECT t.version FROM tsk_task t WHERE t.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND t.task_id = #{taskId} AND t.task_kind = 'HUMAN' AND t.status = 'RUNNING' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tsk_task_assignment a WHERE a.tenant_id = t.tenant_id AND a.task_id = t.task_id AND a.assignment_kind = 'RESPONSIBLE' AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' AND a.principal_id = #{actorId} ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tsk_task_execution_guard g WHERE g.tenant_id = t.tenant_id AND g.task_id = t.task_id AND g.status = 'ACTIVE' ) FOR UPDATE OF t
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO frm_form_submission ( form_submission_id, tenant_id, task_id, project_id, form_version_id, form_key, submission_version, values_document, content_digest, validation_status, prefill_version, submitted_by, submitted_at) VALUES (#{submissionId}, #{tenantId}, #{taskId}, #{projectId}, #{formVersionId}, #{formKey}, #{submissionVersion}, CAST(#{valuesJson} AS jsonb), #{contentDigest}, #{validationStatus}, #{prefillVersion}, #{submittedBy}, #{submittedAt})

INSERT INTO frm_submission_validation ( submission_validation_id, tenant_id, form_submission_id, validator_version, input_digest, validation_status, errors_document, warnings_document, executed_at) VALUES (#{validationId}, #{tenantId}, #{submissionId}, #{validatorVersion}, #{inputDigest}, #{status}, CAST(#{errors} AS jsonb), CAST(#{warnings} AS jsonb), #{executedAt})
mapper.sql: SELECT s.form_submission_id AS "submissionId", s.task_id AS "taskId", s.project_id AS "projectId", s.form_version_id AS "formVersionId", s.form_key AS "formKey", s.submission_version AS "submissionVersion", s.values_document::text AS "valuesJson", s.content_digest AS "contentDigest", s.validation_status AS "validationStatus", s.prefill_version AS "prefillVersion", s.submitted_by AS "submittedBy", s.submitted_at AS "submittedAt", v.errors_document::text AS errors, v.warnings_document::text AS warnings FROM frm_form_submission s JOIN frm_submission_validation v ON v.tenant_id = s.tenant_id AND v.form_submission_id = s.form_submission_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO frm_form_command_result (tenant_id, operation_type, idempotency_key, form_submission_id) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{operationType}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{submissionId})
